# METIC LAB LLM Context Entrypoint

This is the first file every AI coding agent should read.

## Project

METIC LAB is a running performance dashboard for a runner. It combines Strava sync, Garmin running dynamics, scientific training logic, dashboard analytics, Runner DNA, training plan generation, and AI coaching.

Strava supports multiple locally connected athletes; one athlete is active at a time. This is not yet full SaaS auth.

The product goal is not only tracking. It should explain form, fatigue, fitness, biomechanics, race readiness, and training decisions in a way that is useful to a serious amateur runner.

## Stack

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind-style utility classes.
- Routing: React Router in `src/App.tsx`.
- Backend: FastAPI-style Python app in `backend/server.py`.
- Database: MongoDB via Motor async client.
- Maps: Mapbox/MapLibre stack via `react-map-gl`, `mapbox-gl`, `maplibre-gl`.
- Charts: Recharts and custom SVG/React components.
- AI: backend integrations with Claude/Gemini/fallback algorithmic logic.

## Commands

- Install frontend deps: `npm install`
- Start frontend: `npm run dev`
- Type check: `npm run lint`
- Build frontend: `npm run build`
- Update AI context pack: `npm run context:update`
- Check AI context pack freshness: `npm run context:check`
- Backend deps: `pip install -r backend/requirements.txt`
- Backend dev command depends on local env; inspect `backend/server.py` and `render.yaml`.

## Read Order For Any LLM

1. Read this file.
2. Read `.ai-context.md`.
3. Read `repo-map.md` or query `repo-map.json`.
4. For architecture questions, read `docs/architecture.md` and `docs/data-flow.md`.
5. For endpoint questions, read `docs/api-map.md`.
6. For feature work, read the matching file in `docs/module-summaries/`.
7. Only then open the relevant source files.

## Most Important Source Files

- `src/App.tsx`: frontend routes and top navigation.
- `src/api/index.ts`: frontend API wrappers.
- `src/types/api.ts`: API response and domain types used by the frontend.
- `backend/server.py`: backend routes, Strava/Garmin sync, analytics, Runner DNA, training plan.
- `src/components/DashboardView.tsx`: main dashboard.
- `src/components/TrainingView.tsx`, `src/components/TrainingGrid.tsx`: training calendar.
- `src/components/ActivitiesView.tsx`, `src/components/RoutesView.tsx`: activities and run detail.
- `src/components/RunnerDnaView.tsx`: original Runner DNA page.
- `src/components/RunnerDnaV2View.tsx`: premium Runner DNA V2 page.
- `src/utils/runnerDnaModel.ts`: real-data adapter for Runner DNA V2.
- `src/utils/cadence.ts`: frontend cadence normalization.

## Operational Rules

- Do not read or print `.env`, `.env.local`, `backend/.env`, tokens, logs, database dumps, or secrets.
- Do not assume Garmin cadence is half-cadence. Use canonical `avg_cadence_spm` when present.
- Do not load full activity streams in list views; this project has Render memory constraints.
- All backend data queries should remain athlete-scoped by `athlete_id`.
- Use the active Strava athlete (`_get_active_strava_token`) for current-user behavior; do not fall back to "latest token wins".
- Runner DNA cache must be invalidated after data changes that affect profile, Garmin CSV, fitness/freshness, or synced runs.
- After meaningful architecture/API/model changes, run `npm run context:update` and add a note to `CHANGELOG-AI.md`.

## Where To Change What

- Dashboard cards/layout: `src/components/DashboardView.tsx`, `src/components/dashboard/widgetRegistry.ts`.
- Activities list/map/detail: `src/components/ActivitiesView.tsx`, `src/components/RoutesView.tsx`, `src/components/LiveTelemetry3DMap.tsx`.
- Training plan UI: `src/components/TrainingView.tsx`, `src/components/TrainingGrid.tsx`, `src/components/TrainingSidebar.tsx`.
- Training plan backend logic: `backend/server.py` around `/api/training-plan/*`.
- Strava multi-athlete UI/API: `src/components/ProfileView.tsx`, `src/api/index.ts`, `backend/server.py` around `/api/strava/*`.
- Runner DNA backend logic: `backend/server.py` around `/api/runner-dna`.
- Runner DNA V2 UI/model: `src/components/RunnerDnaV2View.tsx`, `src/hooks/useRunnerDnaUiModel.ts`, `src/utils/runnerDnaModel.ts`.
- Garmin CSV import/link: `backend/server.py` around `/api/garmin/csv-*`.
- Cadence normalization: `backend/server.py` Garmin/Strava cadence helpers and `src/utils/cadence.ts`.
- API type updates: `src/types/api.ts` and `src/api/index.ts`.
